businessCapabilities.name: Agreement Terms and Conditions Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to establish, modify, and interpret legally enforceable arrangements, provisions, requirements, rules and specifications of an agreement.

businessCapabilities.name: Agreement Lifecycle Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to activate and terminate an agreement.

businessCapabilities.name: Agreement Definition
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to register (declare into existence) an agreement.

businessCapabilities.name: Agreement Valuation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine agreement balances in various ways (e.g. value date, posting date).

businessCapabilities.name: Agreement Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of agreements with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of agreements.

businessCapabilities.name: Agreement Access Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to define, interpret, and enforce the right to view, use, or modify an agreement.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Instrument Valuation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine and assign the monetary worth of a financial instrument, including mark-to-market and other valuation mechanisms at a point in time.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Instrument Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of financial instruments with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of financial instruments.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Instrument Custodial Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to hold financial instruments in safekeeping on behalf of a third party.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Instrument Position / Balance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the quantity of a given financial instrument.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Instrument Corporate Action Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to administer the correct allocation of entitlements to a customer arising from corporate actions of financial instruments.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Instrument Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to declare a new financial instrument.

businessCapabilities.name: Money Movement Request Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to submit a request for a money movement or exchange and to verify that the requestor has the authority to do so.

businessCapabilities.name: Money Movement Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of money movement with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of money movement.

businessCapabilities.name: Money Movement Validation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to evaluate a monetary movement or exchange to ensure the impact, risk and charges are understood and accepted by the involved parties.

businessCapabilities.name: Money Movement Processing
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to monitor, record, settle a money movement or event.

businessCapabilities.name: Money Movement Routing Determination
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the optimal money movement conduit.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Account Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to establish, maintain, balance, audit, secure, and provide access to a set of financial records that are typically organized into assets, liabilities, income, expenses, equity, and related categories.

businessCapabilities.name: Tax Management
businessCapabilities.description: TBD

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Position Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to oversee the bank's overall asset and liability positions to direct activities and allocate capital to define polices and to ensure the bank remains within its desired profile.

businessCapabilities.name: Finance Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of finance with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of finance.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of customers with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of customers.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Access Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to define, interpret, and enforce the right to view, use, or modify a customer.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Authentication Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine that a customer is who they claim to be.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine how well the customer is tracking to their financial needs including plans and goals.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Needs Assessment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the financial needs of a customer including goal planning, financial planning for the purpose of identifying appropriate products and services.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Profitability Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to evaluate and determine a customers profitability / contribution to the business and determine improvement plans to increase that.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to register a customer.

businessCapabilities.name: Customer Preference Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to capture, track, analyze, and act upon explicit or implicit, customer inclinations, likings, predispositions, or options.

businessCapabilities.name: Human Capital Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of human capital with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of human capital.

businessCapabilities.name: Human Capital to Policy Association
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the policies and guidelines required to govern and protect human capital and align to overall corporate policies.

businessCapabilities.name: Human Capital Acquisition
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to source, evaluate and onboard human resource.

businessCapabilities.name: Human Capital Compensation And Benefits Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage salary, incentives, rewards and benefits of human capital.

businessCapabilities.name: Human Capital Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to develop and assess the effectiveness of human capital.

businessCapabilities.name: Human Capital Termination
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to discontinue the use and agreement with personnel.

businessCapabilities.name: Facilities And Equipment Utilization Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to effectively and efficiently manage the utilization of physical property.

businessCapabilities.name: Facilities And Equipment Maintenance (Upkeep)
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to preserve and improve the existing state (i.e. keep from failure or decline) of physical property.

businessCapabilities.name: Facilities And Equipment Acquisition
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to purchase, lease or build a place, amenity, or item for a particular purpose.

businessCapabilities.name: Facility And Equipment Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of facilities and equipment with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of facilities and equipment.

businessCapabilities.name: Facilities And Equipment Relinquishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to surrender physical property once they are no longer useful or needed by the organization.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Dissemination
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine what, to who and when to communicate information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of information with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Artifact Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage (retain, protect etc..) the original form/artifact of information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Versioning (History Management)
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to track changes to information over time.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Interpretation / Comprehension
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine understand and draw meaning from information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Transformation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to transform information from one form to another.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Analytics
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to identify, establish, validate, and articulate metrics and measures on historic and predictive determinations frim information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Retention /Persistence
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to store, keep and retrieve information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Validation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to confirm and prove the accuracy and authenticity of information.

businessCapabilities.name: Information Collection
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to gather information.

businessCapabilities.name: Market Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of a market with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of markets.

businessCapabilities.name: Market Segmentation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to subdivide a market into unique, identifiable parts that may be targeted individually or in aggregate.

businessCapabilities.name: Market Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to identify, quantify, qualify, and articulate a current or future market.

businessCapabilities.name: Market Forecasting
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to predict or estimate future demand or supply for a given period of time for a given market or market segment.

businessCapabilities.name: Risk Definition
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to ascertain, discover, recognize and organize risks.

businessCapabilities.name: Risk Control Management
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to develop, establish, implement and validate mechanisms (e.g. methods, systems, procedures) that constrain/limit a risk.

businessCapabilities.name: Risk Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of risk with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of risk.

businessCapabilities.name: Risk Assessment
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to consider, judge and evaluate an identified risk.

businessCapabilities.name: Fraud Incident Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of fraud with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of fraud.

businessCapabilities.name: Fraud Incident Detection
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to recognize a fraud incident.

businessCapabilities.name: Fraud Claim Handling
businessCapabilities.description: Is a capability that has the ability to handle fraud claims in order to determine if the claim should be submitted or rejected

businessCapabilities.name: Fraud Incident Prevention Management

businessCapabilities.name: Interaction Analysis (analytics)
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to examine customer interactions in order to determine patterns and other meaningful data that can be used for making improvements.

businessCapabilities.name: Interaction Monitoring
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to record, track a customer interaction.

businessCapabilities.name: Interaction Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to detect and establish a new customer interaction

businessCapabilities.name: Interaction Experience Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to understand customer behavior, perception and satisfaction with respect to interactions with the organization.

businessCapabilities.name: Interaction Information Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to collect, organize, track, report on, or otherwise disseminate basic facts, statistics, attributes, and information about a customer.

businessCapabilities.name: Interaction Design
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to oversee, regulate and control a customer interaction.

businessCapabilities.name: Channel Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the effectiveness of a channel including how well a channel is meeting specification and targets.

businessCapabilities.name: Channel Development
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to identify, leverage,  create new or improve existing avenues through which the organization can communicate, deliver products and services, and otherwise do business.

businessCapabilities.name: Channel Access Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to define, interpret, and enforce the right to view, use, or modify a channel.

businessCapabilities.name: Channel Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of channels with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of channels.

businessCapabilities.name: Policy Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of policies with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of policies.

businessCapabilities.name: Partner Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to find, and establish a partner.

businessCapabilities.name: Partner Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the effectiveness of a partner including how well a partner is meeting specification and targets.

businessCapabilities.name: Partner Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of partners with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of partners.

businessCapabilities.name: Trust Access Management

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of trust with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of trust.

businessCapabilities.name: Task Assignment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to assign and present a task to a resource. (human or otherwise) such as partner, customer, vendor & supplier, or human resource.

businessCapabilities.name: Task Aggregation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to group a set of tasks together for various purposes such as assignment or prioritization.

businessCapabilities.name: Task Definition
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to identify and describe a task.~

businessCapabilities.name: Task Scheduling
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to set a specific time when a task must start or be completed.

businessCapabilities.name: Task Priority Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to set the importance or urgency of a task in relation to all other tasks.

businessCapabilities.name: Trade Finance Issuance
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to issue letters of credit

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of trade finance with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of trade finance.

businessCapabilities.name: Trade Verification Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage trade documentary evidence

businessCapabilities.name: Trade Finance Fees Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage trade finance fees and charges

businessCapabilities.name: Message Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of messages with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of messages.

businessCapabilities.name: Message Creation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to craft a message.

businessCapabilities.name: Intellectual Property Identification
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to discover and identify intellectual property.

businessCapabilities.name: Payment Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of payments with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of payments.

businessCapabilities.name: Payment Valuation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to set and/or determine the monetary value of a payment.

businessCapabilities.name: Payment Notification
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to provide payment advices and notices e.g. posting confirmations, detail reconciliation files for consolidated postings.

businessCapabilities.name: Payment Validation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to verify all aspects of a payment.

businessCapabilities.name: Campaign Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the effectiveness of a campaign including how well a campaign is meeting specification and targets.

businessCapabilities.name: Campaign Design
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to design a campaign

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of a campaign with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of campaigns.

businessCapabilities.name: Campaign Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to declare the existence of a campaign.

businessCapabilities.name: Campaign Market Targeting
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to associate a campaign with a given market or markets.

businessCapabilities.name: Lead Validation
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to manage and monitor opportunity list(s). Includes monitoring pipeline and clean up of pipelines (hygene). Indentify and decide on stalled  and overdue opportunities.

businessCapabilities.name: Lead State Assessment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine state of Opportunity

businessCapabilities.name: Brand Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of brand with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of brand.

businessCapabilities.name: Brand Establishment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to create and articulate a brand in a market.

businessCapabilities.name: Brand Awareness Assessment
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to assess and quantify the degree of familiarity and recognition a brand has within a market.

businessCapabilities.name: Brand Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine how well a brand is meeting objectives (i.e. creating the perception that is intended).

businessCapabilities.name: Product Development
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to move a product from conceptualization through design to its finished state.

businessCapabilities.name: Product Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of products with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of products.

businessCapabilities.name: Product Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine how well a product is meeting specification and objective levels or delivering against plan.

businessCapabilities.name: Product Pricing (Determination)
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to set and maintain a current price list (with ranges and optional terms) by product/customer type, including standard and special (promotional) pricing.

businessCapabilities.name: Product Eligibility Management
businessCapabilities.description:
Ability to define the rules, and constraints that limit a product or product features to specific customer groups.

For example:
Only students are eligible for student accounts or studenbt loans.
Only war veterans are eligible for special conditions/pricing etc...

businessCapabilities.name: Product Version Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to identify, maintain, and service the multitude of variations of a product available in the market.

businessCapabilities.name: Product Sourcing
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to identify, establish, incorporate, and manage external origins of a product or product parts.

businessCapabilities.name: Issued Device Production
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to provision and manufacture an issued device.

businessCapabilities.name: Issued Device Status Management
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to manage and maintain a device status

businessCapabilities.name: Issued Device Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of issued devices with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of issued devices.

businessCapabilities.name: Issued Device to Product Linking
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage (e.g. determine, establish, identify) the relationship of issued devices with products.

businessCapabilities.name: Issued Device to Agreement Linking
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage (e.g. determine, establish, identify) the relationship of issued devices with agreements.

businessCapabilities.name: Issued Device Issuance
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to issue an issued device.

businessCapabilities.name: Vendor And Supplier Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of vendors and suppliers with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of vendors and suppliers.

businessCapabilities.name: Order Placement
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to place or enter an order for the exchange or trade of a financial instrument in the appropriate financial market(s).

businessCapabilities.name: Order Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of an order with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of orders.

businessCapabilities.name: Order Validation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to ensure that a provided order satisfies the minimum level of requirements to place and settle.

businessCapabilities.name: Order Definition/ Creation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to create an order.

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to obtain and provide offers for exchange of a financial instrument in response to a trade order.

businessCapabilities.name: Order Cancellation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to stop an order placement and settlement based on a request or order exception.

businessCapabilities.name: Investment Portfolio Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of investment portfolios with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of investment portfolios.

businessCapabilities.name: Investment Portfolio Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to measure the performance of an investment portfolio including calculating ROR and other types of measurements.

businessCapabilities.name: Investment Portfolio Valuation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to assess and determine the monetary worth of an investment portfolio.

businessCapabilities.name: Investment Portfolio Market Research
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to conduct research on an investment portfolio or an investment within a portfolio.

businessCapabilities.name: Investment Portfolio Allocation Determination
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to define the model/target allocation mix of investments to achieve the objectives as defined for the investment portfolio.

businessCapabilities.name: Investment Portfolio Definition
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to establish, declare, and identify an investment portfolio.

businessCapabilities.name: Sales Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine how well the business is meeting its intended sales objectives and tracking to its sales plan.

businessCapabilities.name: Sales Resource Targeting
businessCapabilities.description: The ability forecast resourcing required and plan the application of resources to the forecast.

businessCapabilities.name: Tax Management
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to help customers to develop tax optimized  solutions

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Plan Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of financial plans with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of financial plans.

businessCapabilities.name: Goal Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine and formulate financial goals for a customer.

businessCapabilities.name: Financial Plan Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to set and determine the effectiveness of a financial plan including how well afinancial plan is meeting specification and targets.

businessCapabilities.name: End of Life Planning
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine and formulate strategies for effective succession and estate execution.

businessCapabilities.name: Investor Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of investors with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of investors.

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage investor information by utilizing information management capabilities and incorporating other related information.

businessCapabilities.name: Investor to Risk Association
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage investor risk by utilizing risk management capabilities and incorporating other related risks.

businessCapabilities.name: Investor Earnings Distribution Management
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to manage bank dividend payouts and allocation

businessCapabilities.name: Investor Communication
businessCapabilities.description: The ability to manage reqular and ad hoc communication and  disclosure (e.g. financial disclosures, merger information, bankruptcy, acquisitions) to investors.

businessCapabilities.name: Business Direction Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to assess and determine the state of the organization with respect to its business direction.

businessCapabilities.name: Business Direction Association Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of business direction with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of business direction.

businessCapabilities.name: Business Direction Implementation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to ascertain, prioritize and fund an action and/or approach that progresses the bank implements toward its business direction.

businessCapabilities.name: Business Direction Formulation
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to conceptualize, articulate, and validate a vision, mission, identity, goal, objective and/or other aspirational target.

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage (e.g. determine, establish, identify) the relationship of loyalty with a market.

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of loyalty with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of loyalty.

businessCapabilities.name: Loyalty Program Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to set and determine the effectiveness of a loyalty program including how well a it is is meeting specification and targets.

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to define, interpret, and enforce the right to view, use, or modify a business entity.

businessCapabilities.name: Business Entity Structuring

businessCapabilities.name: Business Entity Performance Management

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to manage the relationship of collateral with other business objects and/or utilize other capabilities in the management of collateral.

businessCapabilities.name: Collateral Lifecycle Management

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to verify all aspects of an offer.

businessCapabilities.description: Ability to associate an event with a given market or markets.

businessCapabilities.name: Event Performance Management
businessCapabilities.description: Ability to determine the effectiveness of an event including how well an event is meeting specification and targets.
